  "pronunciation_help": "",
  "word_type": "",
  "simple_explanation": "",
  "daily_life_use": "",
  "spoken_use": "",
  "natural_native_use": "",
  "emotional_tone": "",
  "common_collocations": [],
  "examples": [],
  "common_mistakes": "",
  "hindi_confusion_correction": "",
  "formal_informal_note": "",
  "image_url": "Provide a valid, public Wikimedia Commons image URL representing the word."
}
Return ONLY a valid JSON array containing the 50 objects. Do not include markdown code blocks or any other text.
</USER_REQUEST>
<ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
The current local time is: 2026-05-29T23:04:58+05:30.
</ADDITIONAL_METADATA>
